description:
Complete Protection Mantra Meditation | Rakhe Rakhanhar | Mantra Chanting Meditation Music

This is a mantra for protection against all the negativity and all the negative energy and vibrations, both inside and outside us.

MANTRA + MEANING


Rakhay rakhanhaar aap ubaariun
Gur kee pairee paa-eh kaaj savaariun 

Oh, God. You save us all and take us across, 
uplifting and giving excellence. 

You gave us the touch of the lotus feet of the Guru, 
and all our jobs are done with perfection. 

=====

☯ MANTRA MEDITATION MONTH

At Meditative Mind, we are dedicated in creating Music for Healing Chakras,  Chakra Chants, Healing Meditation Mantras, And Relaxation Music .
And this Month is dedicated to MANTRA Meditations
We are featuring various Mantras for Meditation, Mantras for Healing, Mantra for Positive Energy, for Protection, for Removing Obstacles, Mantra for Success, Mantra for Bringing Peace,  and many more. We have recently released ADI SHAKTI MANTRA. Here is our Mantra Meditation Playlist
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLsuCfYXzi5DLQmw5DbidL4xfFk2bNHXuq
